prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划:
2021–2025年物理类最低位次约8462→8390→9004→8750→6838，2025年位次大幅前移约1912名，创近五年最佳，反映该校在河北物理类考生中吸引力显著增强。
2. 【招生计划】该校在河北物理类招生计划2021年152人、2022年145人、2023年144人、2024年142人、2025年151人；2026年计划137人，较2025年减少14人，缩招约9.3%，招 生名额收紧对竞争有加剧作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名2026年第37名（2025年第36名），稳居全国前40，理工科实力突出，属中上流211；2025年高考周期声誉偏正面（投档线稳步提升、入选国家卓越工程师学院、保研率升至27%）；2026年周期出现实验室爆炸火灾事故，声誉转为偏负面；抖音 热度总排名第61，评价"一般"，短视频曝光量中等；第五轮学科评估A-及以上7个：力学A、机械工程A、管理科学与工程A、航空宇航科学与技术A-、控制科学与 工程A-、信息与通信工程A-、软件工程A-，航空与信息类学科群优势明显。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等核心工科专业社会热度持续高热推荐；河北2026年普通高考总人数约609800人，较2025年（约60.7万）略有增加，竞争基数扩大，2025年物理类本科批459分，近年呈小幅上升趋势；南京航空航天大学位于江苏南京，属长三角核心城市，对河北考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在河北招生占比约3%（2025年），非本省高校，无本地倾斜。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综 合2025年位次大幅前移后存在一定回调压力、2026年缩招约9.3%使竞争加剧、学校声誉2026年偏负面可能抑制部分报考热情、考生总数略有增加等因素；预测2026年物理类最低位次约6508名，区间6008–7008名。

major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 位次在预测区间6008–7008名内，建议以二档专业为主力填报、一档专业冲刺、三档专业保底；位次明显优于区间下限（如6000名以内）可重点冲击长空创新班、拔尖创新班等王 牌专业；位次接近区间上限（7000名左右）应以三档专业保底为主，避免滑档风险。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text:
From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 8462 → 8390 → 9004 → 8750 → 6838. In 2025, the ranking significantly advanced by about 1912 places, reaching the best in the past five years, reflecting a notable increase in attractiveness among Hebei Physics Category examinees.
2. [Enrollment Plan] The enrollment plan for this university in Hebei Physics Category was 152 in 2021, 145 in 2022, 144 in 2023, 142 in 2024, and 151 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 137, a decrease of 14 from 2025, a reduction of about 9.3%, tightening admission quotas and intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211 Project, Double First-Class construction university; ranked 37th in the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings (36th in 2025), firmly in the top 40 nationally, with outstanding strength in science and engineering, belonging to the upper-middle tier of 211 universities; reputation during the 2025 college entrance examination cycle was relatively positive (steady increase in admission scores, selection for the National Excellent Engineer Academy, graduate school recommendation rate rising to 27%); during the 2026 cycle, a laboratory explosion and fire accident occurred, turning reputation negative; Douyin popularity total ranking 61st, rated "average", with moderate short video exposure; fifth round of discipline evaluation: 7 disciplines at A- or above: Mechanics A, Mechanical Engineering A, Management Science and Engineering A, Aerospace Science and Technology A-, Control Science and Engineering A-, Information and Communication Engineering A-, Software Engineering A-, with a clear advantage in aerospace and information discipline clusters.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Core engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to be highly popular and recommended; the total number of regular college entrance examination takers in Hebei in 2026 is approximately 609,800, a slight increase from 2025 (about 607,000), expanding the competition base; the 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch score was 459, showing a slight upward trend in recent years; Nanjing University of Aeronautics and Astronautics is located in Nanjing, Jiangsu, a core city in the Yangtze River Delta, with strong regional appeal to Hebei examinees; the university's enrollment proportion in Hebei is about 3% (2025), not a local university, with no local preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the significant ranking advance in 2025 creating some correction pressure, the 2026 enrollment reduction of about 9.3% intensifying competition, the negative reputation in 2026 potentially suppressing some application enthusiasm, and a slight increase in total examinees; the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is approximately 6508, with a range of 6008–7008.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Competitive)

- Artificial Intelligence
- Electronic Information (Top Innovation Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Electrical Engineering and Automation
- Automation
- Software Engineering
- Information Security
- Aerospace (Regular Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Mechanical Engineering
- Energy Storage Science and Engineering
- Information Management and Information Systems
- Big Data Management and Application
- Engineering Mechanics (Qian Weichang Class).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 6008–7008, it is recommended to primarily apply for Tier 2 majors, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options; if your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (e.g., within 6000), you can focus on targeting flagship majors like the Changkong Innovation Class and Top Innovation Class; if your ranking is near the upper limit of the range (around 7000), you should mainly rely on Tier 3 majors as safety options to avoid the risk of not being admitted.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 2010 → 2445 → 2986 → 2998 → 2906, showing a general backward trend in recent years. In 2025, it moved slightly forward by 92 places compared to 2024, with small fluctuations, indicating a stable but slightly backward trend. The enrollment plan for History Category in Hebei was 4 in 2021, 8 in 2022, 11 in 2023, 13 in 2024, and 14 in 2025. In 2026, the plan is 29, an increase of 15 from 2025, an expansion of about 107%, which is extremely significant and will greatly alleviate competition pressure.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: It is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science Chinese University Ranking, it ranks 37th. Although it is strong in science and engineering, as a well-known 211 university, it still has strong appeal to History Category candidates. During the 2025 college entrance examination cycle, its reputation was relatively positive (increased admission scores, excellent engineer college, increased graduate school recommendation rate). In the 2026 cycle, a laboratory explosion incident occurred, turning the reputation negative. Its overall popularity on Douyin ranks 61st, with a rating of 'average'. The university's advantageous disciplines are concentrated in engineering. The History Category enrollment majors (Accounting, Business Administration, English, Administrative Management, Radio and Television, Law, Finance) correspond to discipline evaluations: Management Science and Engineering is A, Business Administration is not independently rated, and the disciplinary support for liberal arts majors is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: In 2024, Accounting/Finance/Auditing was assessed as recommended (relatively hot), Law is divided and wait-and-see, Foreign Languages is generally wait-and-see, and Journalism and Communication is clearly discouraged. In 2026, the total number of candidates for the general college entrance examination in Hebei is about 609,800, a slight increase from 2025. The provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch in 2025 is 477 points, showing an upward trend in recent years. Nanjing is located in the core area of the Yangtze River Delta, which has strong regional appeal to History Category candidates from Hebei. This university is not a local university in Hebei, so there is no local enrollment preference.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering that the 2025 ranking is basically flat, the 2026 History Category enrollment plan has significantly expanded by 107%, which will greatly ease competition, the school's reputation in 2026 is somewhat negative, which may suppress some application enthusiasm, and the total number of candidates has slightly increased, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 will be about 4975, with a range of 4475–5475.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Accounting
- Law (New in 2026)
- Finance (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Business Administration (Business Analytics and Digital Management)
- English (Civil Aviation Business, International Trade)
- Administrative Management.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Radio and Television
- Administrative Management (Artificial Intelligence/Aviation Management Composite Innovation Class) (New in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4475–5475, the significant expansion of History Category in 2026 greatly increases admission opportunities. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, moderately aim for Tier 1 majors, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (within 4500), you can focus on popular majors like Accounting and Law. If your ranking is close to the upper limit of the range (around 5400), you should use Tier 3 majors like Radio and Television as safety options.
